Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class MobSecurityCertPinConfig

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.MobSecurityCertPinConfig
public class MobSecurityCertPinConfig extends Metadata

Java class for MobSecurityCertPinConfig complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="MobSecurityCertPinConfig">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="certificateHash" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="domainName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="isEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="isProtected" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isSubdomainIncluded" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="masterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="mobilePlatform" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}MobileSecurityMobilePlatform" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="mobileSecurityAssignment" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="severityLevel" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}MobileSecurityPolicySeverityLevel"/>
         <element name="type" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}MobileSecurityCertPinType"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
